name: feed-prototype
description: Swipe platform (Telegram Mini App): vertical feed of playable mini-games with a social layer (stars, series, challenges) and generative UGC meta experiments. See README.md and ISLAND.md.

scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit && npm run check:rewards && npm run check:series
scripts.verify:island: npm run lint && vite build && npm --prefix ../swipe-generator run check && npm --prefix ../swipe-ugc run verify
